history.content:
<thought>
I am facing forward with a wall (#) directly ahead. To progress, I need to turn to find a free path. The right side has lava (L), so turning right is unsafe. Turning left should open a path on the floor (.). I will turn left to explore that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing left with a wall (#) directly ahead, and there is lava (L) one cell forward-right, which is unsafe. However, the cell directly forward seems to be a wall, so moving forward is not possible. I will turn left to explore a different direction and possibly find a path without lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left again according to the character '^' at bottom-center. The cell forward in front of me is a floor (.) which is safe to move into. I will move forward to advance along the clear path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
